status.readyDesc: Graph is fully loaded and interactive
status.nodesCountDesc: Total files and symbols in the graph
status.aiIndexStatusDesc: Repo is fully indexed for AI queries

title: Help & Reference
footerLong: GitNexus — open source codebase graph explorer

overview.whatIsDescription: An interactive graph explorer for your codebase. Every file, function, and import becomes a node you can explore, query, and navigate visually.
overview.wayAsk: Ask Nexus AI a natural language question
overview.navFocus: Double-click a node to focus its subgraph

graph.sizeDescription: Node size reflects connection count — larger nodes are depended on by more files. Edges point from importer → imported.
graph.detailDescription: Click any node to open its detail panel — showing imports, exports, and reverse dependencies.

search.title: Search & filter
search.searchDescription: Search by filename, function name, or import path. Matching nodes are highlighted live in the graph.
search.filterDescription: Use the filter icon in the left sidebar to isolate specific node types, hide leaf nodes, or focus on a depth range from a selected root.

ai.title: Nexus AI
ai.description: Your repo is indexed and ready for semantic queries. Nexus AI understands code structure and relationships, not just file names.

questions.dependencies: "Which files depend on the auth module?"
questions.imports: "Show me all files that import useEffect"

ai.openPrompt: Open the prompt via the Nexus AI button (top-right).
